sizing_rule.note: Lever constrained tangent portfolio (RFR=0 for futures, actual RFR for stocks, weights=1.00) to geometric optimal point. Use RFR of 0 for futures (no borrowing), actual leverage costs for stocks. Find tangent portfolio at constraint then scale to geometric optimal.

source_rule_text: Use a Risk-Free Rate (RFR) of 0 for futures contracts since no actual borrowing or lending occurs; for stocks, determine RFR based on actual leverage costs, then lever the constrained optimal portfolio (weights summing to 1.00) up to the geometric optimal point.
